scenario: User records a daily mood entry successfully
steps: Navigate to the mood check-in interface
Select a mood and relevant emotion labels
expected_result: The mood entry is saved and the user receives confirmation that submission was successful.

scenario: User submits a check-in with minimal input
steps: Navigate to the mood check-in interface
expected_result: The system accepts the valid minimum required input and stores the entry.

scenario: User views weekly mood history
steps: Log in with an account that has at least seven recorded mood entries
expected_result: The system displays a visual summary of the user's mood data for the selected week.

scenario: User views monthly mood trend
steps: Log in with an account that has at least one month of mood entries
expected_result: The system displays a monthly trend view based on the user's recorded moods.

scenario: Reflection questions change after repeated use
steps: Log in with an account that has completed multiple check-ins over several days
expected_result: The questions are not identical to earlier prompts and reflect prior user responses.

scenario: System adapts prompts based on previously reported stress
steps: Use an account that has repeatedly logged high stress levels
Review the reflection questions and prompt content
expected_result: The system presents prompts relevant to stress and emotional coping rather than unrelated generic questions.

scenario: New user completes a free mood check-in
steps: Install and open the app as a new user
Create or open an account if needed
Navigate to the core mood tracking feature
expected_result: The user can complete at least one full mood check-in without being blocked by a paywall.

scenario: Core mood tracking remains available without subscription
steps: Log in with a non-subscribed user account
Navigate to the mood tracking feature
Attempt to create a mood entry
expected_result: The system allows access to the core mood tracking feature without requiring payment.

scenario: Premium feature is labeled before access
steps: Log in as a non-subscribed user
Inspect the feature label or access screen
expected_result: The system clearly indicates that the feature requires a paid subscription before the user attempts to use it.

scenario: Locked feature shows subscription message
steps: Log in as a non-subscribed user
expected_result: The system displays a clear message explaining that the feature is unavailable without a subscription.

scenario: User logs in successfully with valid credentials
expected_result: The user is logged in successfully and the app remains stable.

scenario: App does not crash during login process
steps: Submit the form and wait for the response
expected_result: The system completes the login process without crashing, freezing, or blocking access.

scenario: User changes notification preference
expected_result: The system saves the updated notification preference and applies it immediately.

scenario: User changes app language
expected_result: The system updates the language setting and displays interface text in the selected language.

scenario: User reviews data-sharing settings
steps: Review available data collection and sharing options
expected_result: The system displays the personal data categories collected and allows the user to review sharing settings.

scenario: User disables optional data sharing
expected_result: The system saves the new preference and optional sharing is disabled.

scenario: User declines optional permissions and continues
steps: Open the app as a new or returning user
expected_result: The user can continue using core features without granting optional permissions.

scenario: Core features remain usable after optional consent refusal
steps: Navigate to mood check-in and mood history
expected_result: Core features continue to function even when optional permissions are not granted.

scenario: User accesses in-app support resources
steps: Navigate to the support or resources section
Select one of the available support items
expected_result: The system displays relevant mental health support content within the application.

scenario: User browses multiple support resources
expected_result: The user can access multiple support resources without navigation errors.

scenario: High-distress mood entry triggers support guidance
steps: Complete a mood check-in and indicate high distress
expected_result: The system provides at least one relevant coping suggestion or support resource after submission.

scenario: Support shown after repeated negative check-ins
steps: Use an account with several recent high-distress entries
expected_result: The system shows guidance or support options tailored to the user's repeated distress pattern.

scenario: Mood check-in completes within performance target
steps: Open the app under normal network and device conditions
Navigate to the mood check-in screen
Submit a mood entry while measuring response time
expected_result: The system completes the interaction in 2 seconds or less.

scenario: Mood history loads within performance target
steps: Log in under normal network and device conditions
Navigate to the mood history section while measuring response time
expected_result: The system displays the requested history view in 2 seconds or less.
